summary: Completed testing of iteration 17 features: Cash Handling for FDE/Branch Admin, Create Payment Plan from Students page, Plan button removal from Enrollments Enrolled tab, Notifications system, and Follow-up Reminders endpoint. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verification completed successfully.

cash_handling_fde.details: FDE can view today's cash total (₹18,333 with 2 payments), submit deposit records with remarks and receipt URL

cash_handling_branch_admin.details: Branch Admin can view cash handling history with date filters, shows deposited status and receipt links

create_payment_plan_students_page.details: Students page shows 'Create Plan' button for students without payment plans (Tania). Dialog opens with Full Payment and Installments options. Installments auto-calculates amounts and provides due date pickers.

plan_button_removed_enrolled_tab.details: Enrollments Enrolled tab now shows 'No Plan' (orange badge) or 'Plan Created' (green badge) instead of Plan button. Branch Admin can still edit plans via Edit button.

notifications_system.details: Notification center panel works, shows 'Enable Push' button. lead_converted notification logic is correctly implemented in backend (creates notifications for FDEs when leads convert)

followup_reminders_endpoint.details: /api/notifications/followup-reminders endpoint returns reminders due in next 10 minutes. Currently returns empty array (no follow-ups scheduled in window)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 features all working. Cash Handling at /cash-handling shows FDE today's cash and Branch Admin history. Students page has Create Plan button for students without plans. Enrollments Enrolled tab no longer has Plan button. Notification bell in header opens notification panel. Audio notifications configured but require browser permission.
notes: Audio notification feature requires browser permission to play sounds. Push notification setup requires service worker registration which depends on HTTPS and browser support.
